# CyrusOne

**Category:** AI Colocation / GPU Hosting Partners  
**Website:** https://cyrusone.com/

## Headline
Large-scale colocation platform relevant to AI capacity and enterprise deployment strategy.

## Overview
CyrusOne is relevant when buyers are comparing leased capacity, large-scale colocation strategy, and time-to-capacity tradeoffs versus owned buildouts. It belongs in the decision set for organizations that need infrastructure quickly without taking on full deployment ownership.

## Key capabilities
- large-scale colocation capacity
- enterprise and platform-grade deployment support
- AI-ready facility option set

## Best fit for
- buyers weighing lease-versus-build decisions
- organizations needing faster capacity access
- enterprise AI teams seeking operational scale

## Considerations
Should be compared against modular and dedicated-build pathways on control, lead time, and long-term economics.
